behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the three requirements in instruction.md maps to corresponding test functions, plus regression check for disable_envs_cache/gc.unfreeze.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and have docstrings.
